h3. *Overview*
 * Module M operates in two modes sharing a single flag
 ** Mode Alpha is always active when Mode Beta turns on
 ** Disabling Alpha while Beta is active must raise a warning popup

h3. *AS-IS*
 * N/A

h3. *TO-BE*
 * {color:#de350b}Alpha remains ON whenever Beta is ON{color}
 ** {color:#de350b}Attempting Alpha ON -> OFF while Beta is ON keeps Alpha ON and shows a warning popup{color}
 *** {color:#de350b}STATE_FLAG = 0x5: gated off for Beta{color}
 *** {color:#de350b}popup duration: 1 second{color}
 * {color:#de350b}Alpha returns to previous value when Beta turns OFF{color}
 ** Alpha pre-Beta value: OFF
 *** Beta ON -> Alpha ON
 *** Beta OFF -> Alpha OFF
 ** Alpha pre-Beta value: ON
 *** Beta ON -> Alpha ON
 *** Beta OFF -> Alpha ON



※ Signal processing
|Beta ON
(OR)| * {color:#de350b}module A normal check {color}{color:#172b4d}& (flag_main = 0x1 (On) \|\| flag_alt = 0x1 (On)){color}
 * {color:#de350b}module A abnormal check & (flag_alt = 0x1 (On)){color}|
|Beta OFF
(OR)| * {color:#de350b}module A normal check{color}{color:#172b4d} & (flag_main = 0x0 (Off) && flag_alt = 0x0 (Off)){color}
 * {color:#de350b}module A abnormal check & (flag_alt = 0x0 (Off)){color}|
|Alpha ON|FLAG_ALPHA = 0x2 (On)|
|Alpha OFF|FLAG_ALPHA = 0x1 (Off)|

(flag_alt is an internal interface signal named IDC.u8AltFlag)

h3. *Source*
 * Internal requirement
 ** [EXAMPLE-100 [draft] extended mode spec|https://example.com/browse/EXAMPLE-100]
 ** [EXAMPLE-101 [draft] state redefinition notes|https://example.com/browse/EXAMPLE-101]
 ** [^session_notes.msg]

h3. *Plan*
 * Master Event: release v1 ([release_v1|https://example.com/pages/release-v1])
 * Application Event: version-specific

h3. *Impact*
 * Positive effect: user requirement met
 * Negative effect: N/A
